Australia

Australia Awards Scholarships for Migrant Students from Turkey

Published 27 Jun 20266 min read✍ MigrantScholar Team✓ Verified 27 Jun 2026
Advertisement

Introduction to Australia Awards Scholarships for Migrant Students from Turkey

If you're a migrant student from Turkey looking to pursue postgraduate studies in Australia, the Australia Awards Scholarships are an excellent opportunity to consider. These scholarships, offered by the Australian government, provide financial support to international students, including those from Turkey, to undertake master's or PhD programs at Australian universities. The Australia Awards Scholarships aim to promote knowledge, education links, and enduring ties between Australia and its partner countries, including Turkey.

Who Qualifies for the Australia Awards Scholarships

To be eligible for the Australia Awards Scholarships, migrant students from Turkey must hold a valid visa that falls under one of the following categories:

* Permanent Resident (subclass 801)

* Temporary Graduate (subclass 485)

* Skilled Independent (subclass 189)

* Skilled Nominated (subclass 190)

* Temporary Skilled Migration visa (subclass 457 or 482)

Available Scholarships for Migrant Students from Turkey

Here are five real scholarships available to migrant students from Turkey:

Australia Awards Scholarship

The Australia Awards Scholarship covers full tuition fees, living expenses, and other study-related costs, with a total value of AUD 30,000 per year. To be eligible, applicants must hold a bachelor's degree with a minimum GPA of 3.0, meet the English language proficiency requirements, and be applying for a master's or PhD program at an Australian university. The deadline for applications is November 15, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.australiaawards.gov.au/.

Endeavour Postgraduate Scholarship

The Endeavour Postgraduate Scholarship provides up to AUD 140,500 per year, covering tuition fees, living expenses, and travel costs. Eligible applicants must have a bachelor's degree with a minimum GPA of 3.0, meet the English language proficiency requirements, and be applying for a master's or PhD program at an Australian university. The deadline for applications is June 30, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.education.gov.au/.

International Postgraduate Research Scholarship

The International Postgraduate Research Scholarship covers full tuition fees and provides a living allowance of AUD 28,597 per year. To be eligible, applicants must hold a bachelor's degree with a minimum GPA of 3.0, meet the English language proficiency requirements, and be applying for a PhD program at an Australian university. The deadline for applications is October 31, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.unsw.edu.au/.

Australian Government Research Training Program Scholarship

The Australian Government Research Training Program Scholarship provides up to AUD 30,000 per year, covering tuition fees and living expenses. Eligible applicants must have a bachelor's degree with a minimum GPA of 3.0, meet the English language proficiency requirements, and be applying for a master's or PhD program at an Australian university. The deadline for applications is September 30, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.monash.edu/.

University of Melbourne Graduate Research Scholarship

The University of Melbourne Graduate Research Scholarship covers full tuition fees and provides a living allowance of AUD 31,200 per year. To be eligible, applicants must hold a bachelor's degree with a minimum GPA of 3.0, meet the English language proficiency requirements, and be applying for a PhD program at the University of Melbourne. The deadline for applications is August 31, 2026. For more information, visit https://www.unimelb.edu.au/.

Application Steps for the Australia Awards Scholarships

To apply for the Australia Awards Scholarships, follow these steps:

  • Check your eligibility for the scholarship by reviewing the eligibility criteria on the official website.

  • Choose your preferred Australian university and program.

  • Prepare your documents, including your academic transcripts, English language proficiency test results, and proof of identity.

  • Submit your application through the online application portal.

  • Wait for the application to be processed and reviewed.

  • If shortlisted, attend an interview with the selection committee.

  • Receive notification of the scholarship outcome.

  • Accept the scholarship offer and complete any required paperwork.

Documents Checklist for the Australia Awards Scholarships

Here is a checklist of documents you may need to provide as part of your application:

* Academic transcripts

* English language proficiency test results

* Proof of identity (passport or national ID card)

* Proof of visa status (if applicable)

* Proof of residency (if applicable)

* Letters of recommendation (if required)

* Personal statement or research proposal

Frequently Asked Questions about the Australia Awards Scholarships

Here are some frequently asked questions about the Australia Awards Scholarships:

  • What is the Australia Awards Scholarship?

The Australia Awards Scholarship is a scholarship program offered by the Australian government to international students, including those from Turkey, to undertake postgraduate studies at Australian universities.

  • How do I apply for the Australia Awards Scholarship?

To apply for the Australia Awards Scholarship, you need to submit an online application through the official website, providing all required documents and information.

  • What are the eligibility criteria for the Australia Awards Scholarship?

To be eligible for the Australia Awards Scholarship, you must hold a bachelor's degree with a minimum GPA of 3.0, meet the English language proficiency requirements, and be applying for a master's or PhD program at an Australian university.

  • What is the deadline for applications?

The deadline for applications varies depending on the scholarship, but most deadlines fall between June and November 2026.

  • Can I apply for multiple scholarships?

Yes, you can apply for multiple scholarships, but you can only accept one offer.

  • How long does it take to process the application?

The application processing time varies, but most applications are processed within 2-3 months.

  • What are the benefits of the Australia Awards Scholarship?

The Australia Awards Scholarship provides financial support, covering full tuition fees, living expenses, and other study-related costs.

  • Can I work part-time while studying in Australia?

Yes, international students, including those from Turkey, can work part-time up to 20 hours per week while studying in Australia.

External Resources

For more information about the Australia Awards Scholarships and studying in Australia, visit the Australian Government Department of Education, Skills and Employment or the University of Melbourne websites.

Conclusion

In conclusion, the Australia Awards Scholarships are a great opportunity for migrant students from Turkey to pursue postgraduate studies in Australia. By following the application steps and providing all required documents, you can increase your chances of securing a scholarship. For more information about scholarships and studying in Australia, visit the Migrant Scholar blog at https://migrantscholar.vercel.app/blog.
